title: Under the Pampas Moon
writer: Gordon Morris, Ernest Pascal, Bradley King
actors: Warner Baxter, Ketti Gallian, John Miljan
plot: Cesare Campo is a hard-riding and hard-loving Argentine gaucho. Yvonne LaMarr is a famous Parisian singer on her way to play an engagement in a Buenos Aires cabaret. THe plane she is flying in is forced to land on the Pampas. Camp...
